titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/140

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=401 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:01:50.196722+00 | translation moa=402 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:01:51.697184+00

p.span:
Omnibus hanc Cartam visuris vel audituris . Symon Mauleuerer et Gilibertus Auenel salutem .
Nouerit vniuersitas uestra nos concessisse et presenti Carta nostra confirmasse Helene filie Symonis de
lindesie terram de hungerigge In territorio de Molle . quam scilicet dictas Helena tenet In feudo nostro
de Molle de Roberto de polloch . et ysabella uxore eius . Et Insuper quoddam partum sub hederedesete In ter
ra nostra . quod vocatur holemede . Habend’ et tenend’ dicte helene et heredibus suis de nobis et
heredibus nostris . In perpetuum Iure hereditario . libere . quiete . plenarie et honorifice . eodem modo in omnibus
et per omnia  sicut Carta Symonis de lindesie patris sui proportat . testatur . et confirmat .
Et vt hec concessio nostra et confirmatio eidem helene et heredibus suis rata et inconcussa in posterum
permaneat  ego Symon mauleuerer huic Carte sigillum meum apposui . Ego uero Gilibertus a
uenel quia sigillum proprium non habuit  eam sigillo Willelmi auenel patris mei confirmaui . Hiis testibus
Ricardo de Lincolnia . Rad’ Le Neym . Symone de grubbeheued . Ada de yetham . Iohanne de Munford .
Ada filio Nicholai . Henrrico filio vlf . et multis aliis :

p.cl: To all who shall see or hear this charter, Simon Mauleverer and Gilbert Avenel send greeting.

Let your whole community know us to have granted and by our present charter to have made firm to Helen daughter of Simon of Lindsay the land of ‘Hungerigge’ in the territory of Mow, that is, which the said Helen holds in our feu of Mow of Robert of Pollok and Isabel his wife. And in addition a portion of land near ‘Hederedesete’ in our land, which is called ‘Holemede’. For the said Helen and her heirs to have and to hold of us and our heirs for ever by right of heritage, freely, quitely, fully and honourably, in the same way in all things and through all things, just as the charter of Simon of Lindsay, her father, shows, bears witness and confirms. And that this our grant and confirmation to the same Helen and her heirs should endure established and undisputed into the future, I Simon Mauleverer apply my seal to this charter. And I Gilbert Avenel, since I do not have my own seal, have confirmed it with the seal of my father, William Avenel.
With these witnesses: Richard of Lincoln; Ralph le Nain; Simon of Grubbit; Adam of Yetholm; John of Munford; Adam son of Nicholas; Henry son of Ulf; and many others.
